subcodes.first_line: O Lord, make Thou this marriage to become a cause of heavenly blessings and a means of enkindlement with the fire of Thy love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند اين اقتران را سبب برکت آسمانی کن و اسباب اشتعال بنار محبّتت در ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
